vocab.meaning: khuynh hướng thích sự biệt lập/một mình
vocab.example: Even as a toddler, I exhibited a reclusive tendency, often found tucked away in a corner with a picture book.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực/hoạt động chung của tập thể
vocab.example: I thrived in communal endeavors, such as building elaborate sandcastles with the neighborhood kids.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: Solo activities like painting allowed me to maintain uninterrupted focus, which I found deeply satisfying.

vocab.meaning: giao lưu một cách gián đoạn/thỉnh thoảng mới chơi chung
vocab.example: I was the type of child who would play by myself for hours and only socialize intermittently when a game looked particularly exciting.
Team sports taught me the value of harmonious coordination, even if I was naturally quite shy.

vocab.meaning: bản tính hay tự ngẫm/hướng nội
vocab.example: My introspective nature led me to prefer solitary walks in the park over boisterous birthday parties.

vocab.meaning: sự cộng hưởng/phối hợp của nhóm
vocab.example: I enjoyed the group synergy that occurred when my classmates and I worked together to solve a complex puzzle.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi tưởng tượng một mình
vocab.example: I spent a vast amount of my time in solitary imaginative play, creating whole empires in my backyard.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng kỹ năng liên nhân thế/kỹ năng đối nhân xử thế
vocab.example: Being part of a large scout group was instrumental to foster interpersonal skills during my formative years.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy sự an yên/niềm an ủi trong
vocab.example: Whenever I felt overwhelmed, I would seek solace in independent hobbies like playing the piano.
